name: mulerouter
description: Generates images and videos using MuleRouter or MuleRun multimodal APIs. Text-to-Image, Image-to-Image, Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video, video editing (VACE, keyframe interpolation). Use when the user wants to generate, edit, or transform images and videos using AI models like Wan2.6 or Nano Banana.
capabilities: Create videos from text or images
Async task polling for long operations
author: openmule
securitySummary: All 459 static findings are false positives. This is a legitimate AI media generation API client that uses standard patterns for configuration management (environment variables, .env files), API authentication (Bearer tokens to api.mulerouter.ai, api.mulerun.com), and plugin architecture. No credential exfiltration or malicious behavior detected.
valueStatement: Creating professional AI-generated media requires complex API integrations and model management. MuleRouter skill simplifies this by providing a unified interface for generating images and videos using state-of-the-art AI models.
userTitle: Generate AI Images and Videos with MuleRouter
limitations: Requires MuleRouter or MuleRun API key
Media generation takes 5-15 minutes for videos
Network access required for API calls

useCases.title: Create social media videos
useCases.description: Generate engaging video content from text descriptions for YouTube, TikTok, or Instagram.

useCases.title: Prototype visual concepts
useCases.description: Quickly generate and iterate on visual ideas before committing to full production.

useCases.title: Build AI-powered applications
useCases.description: Integrate media generation capabilities into applications without managing multiple AI providers.

promptTemplates.title: Basic image
promptTemplates.prompt: Create an image of a serene mountain lake at sunset with pine trees reflected in the water

promptTemplates.title: Video from image
promptTemplates.prompt: Convert this landscape photo into a 5-second video with gentle camera movement and swaying trees

promptTemplates.title: Style transfer
promptTemplates.prompt: Transform this portrait into anime style while keeping the persons features recognizable

promptTemplates.title: Advanced video edit
promptTemplates.prompt: Apply keyframe interpolation to create smooth slow-motion effect from this 2-second clip

bestPractices: Set appropriate timeouts - 5 minutes for images, 15 for videos
Check model parameters before generation for best results
Store API keys in environment variables, never in code
Use specific, detailed prompts for better output quality
antiPatterns: Hardcoding API keys in source code
Not checking model availability before generation
Ignoring async task status during long operations

faq.question: How do I get an API key?
faq.answer: Sign up at mulerouter.ai or mulerun.com to obtain your API key.

faq.question: Which models are supported?
faq.answer: Alibaba Wan2.6 series and Google Nano Banana models for media tasks.

faq.question: How long does generation take?
faq.answer: Images take 2-5 minutes, videos 10-15 minutes depending on complexity.

faq.question: Can I use my own images?
faq.answer: Yes, provide image URLs for image-to-video or image-to-image transformations.

faq.question: What file formats are supported?
faq.answer: JPG, PNG for images and MP4 for videos are supported.

faq.question: Is there a cost for using this?
faq.answer: Yes, MuleRouter charges per generation based on model and output type.
